---
title: "D | `parTable()` und `lavTech()`"
format: live-html
engine: knitr  
status: "Version 0.1"
lang: de 
---

{{< include _extensions/r-wasm/live/_knitr.qmd >}}
 
## Lesen der `parTable` und Motivation für `lavTech()`

```{webr}
#| warning: false
#| echo: false

webr::install("quadprog",  repos = "https://kroehne.github.io/webr-quadprog-repo")
 
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(mnormt))
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(lavaan))
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(lavaanPlot))
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(DT))

assignInNamespace("lav_options_checkinterval", function(x, nm, num2int) {
    if (any(is.na(x))) return(TRUE)
    if (num2int) x <- as.integer(x)                                                                                              
    oks <- vapply(x, function(x1) {
      (x1 > nm$bounds[1] || (x1 == nm$bounds[1] && nm$first.in)) &&                                                              
      (x1 < nm$bounds[2] || (x1 == nm$bounds[2] && nm$last.in))                                                                  
    }, TRUE)
    all(oks)                                                                                                                     
  }, ns = "lavaan")

 
View <- function(dat){
  dat_name <- deparse(substitute(dat))
  df_display <- dat |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    dplyr::across(everything(), ~ ifelse(is.na(.x), "❌ (NA)", .x))
  )
  
  DT::datatable(
    df_display,
    rownames = FALSE, 
    options = list(
      pageLength = 5,
      scrollX = TRUE,
      dom = 'tip',   
      columnDefs = list(list(className = 'dt-center', targets = "_all"))
    ),
    caption = htmltools::tags$caption(
      style = 'caption-side: top; text-align: left;',
      'data.frame: ', htmltools::strong(dat_name)
    )
  )  
}

 model <- 'eta1 =~ 1*Y1 + 1*Y2 + 1*Y3 + 1*Y4
  Y1 ~~ epsilon11 * Y1
  Y2 ~~ epsilon22 * Y2
  Y3 ~~ epsilon33 * Y3
  Y4 ~~ epsilon44 * Y4
  epsilon22==epsilon11
  epsilon33==epsilon11
  epsilon44==epsilon11'
sim <- simulateData(model, sample.nobs=50)
fit <- sem(model, data=sim)
```


### Parameter (`partable`) aus Syntax

```{webr}
#| warning: false
#| echo: true
#| autorun: false
 model <- 'eta1 =~ 1*Y1 + 1*Y2 + 1*Y3 + 1*Y4
  Y1 ~~ epsilon11 * Y1
  Y2 ~~ epsilon22 * Y2
  Y3 ~~ epsilon33 * Y3
  Y4 ~~ epsilon44 * Y4
  epsilon22==epsilon11
  epsilon33==epsilon11
  epsilon44==epsilon11'

partable <- lavaan::lavaanify(model = model)
partable
```

### Parameter mit `parTable()` aus geschätztem Modell

```{webr}
#| warning: false
#| echo: true
#| autorun: false
# Hier ein Trick, den wir später besprechen: Simulieren
# von Daten zu einer Modellsyntax
sim <- simulateData(model, sample.nobs=50)
fit <- sem(model, data=sim)

partable <- parTable(fit)
partable[,c("id","lhs","op","rhs","user","block","free",
            "ustart","exo","label","plabel")]
```
 

### Matrixschreibweise des Modells analog zur `parTable()`

```{webr}
#| warning: false
#| echo: true
#| autorun: false
lavMatrixRepresentation(partable)[,
  c("lhs","op","rhs","free","label",
    "mat","row","col")]
```



### Matrixschreibweise des Modells über `lavTech()`

```{webr}
#| warning: false
#| echo: true
#| autorun: false
lavTech(fit)
```


```{webr}
#| warning: false
#| echo: true
#| autorun: false
lavTech(fit, what="start")
```


```{webr}
#| warning: false
#| echo: true
#| autorun: false
lavTech(fit, what="est")
```
Weitere Optionen:

```{webr}
#| warning: false
#| echo: true
#| autorun: false
?lavTech
```
